creator: sa2c@and.or.jp
text:
/etc/periodic/daily/110.clean-tmps reports like

How-To-Repeat: Insert 'daily_clean_disks_enable="YES"' in /etc/periodic.conf and type the following commands:
mkdir -p /tmp/path/to/dir
touch /tmp/path/to/dir/file
touch -t 19700102 /tmp/path/to/dir
/etc/periodic/daily/110.clean-tmps
